text.message: Really need a brick or wheat here.
If you get the spot you’re at 8
He’s also at zero cards and you have 9
With zero cards.  And you have 9.
That’s your fault for wasting a knight blue
I mean it was a free sheep
Well now it’s on your spot
And you’re begging someone else to move it
I mean I’ll move it if you help me dev.
